metadata.description: Design-aware iterative code generation from Figma to production-ready frontend code. Supports React/Next.js, Vue/Nuxt, Svelte/SvelteKit, Angular, Solid.js/SolidStart, and Astro.

plugins.name: d2c
plugins.description: Generates design tokens from your codebase, pulls Figma designs via MCP, generates code matching your project conventions (React/Next.js, Vue/Nuxt, Svelte/SvelteKit, Angular, Solid.js, Astro), and visually verifies output via Playwright screenshot comparison.
